summary: Phase 3 Frontend UI Testing COMPLETE. All 25 test features PASSED (100%). Tested: AddLeadModal (Project Type/Industry/Deliverable Type selectors), DeliverablesTab (CRUD + conditional fields), Dashboard filters (Project Type/Industry), Kanban cards (service type badges), LeadDetailModal (5 tabs). No critical issues found. All UI components working as expected.
passed_tests: Login and navigate to dashboard - PASS
Dashboard shows 'All Types' and 'All Industries' filter dropdowns in toolbar - PASS
Dashboard Kanban board shows lead cards with service type badges - PASS (19 cards, Photography/Commission badges visible)
Click '+ Add Lead' button opens AddLeadModal - PASS
AddLeadModal shows Project Type selector (4 cards: Service, Commission, Project, Product Sale) - PASS
AddLeadModal shows Client Information section (name, email, phone, company) - PASS
AddLeadModal shows Service Type and Industry dropdowns - PASS
AddLeadModal shows Deliverable Type selector (6 options: Digital Files, Physical Art, Prints, Service, Website, Mixed) - PASS
Selecting 'Commission' project type shows commission-specific fields (Dimensions, Material) - PASS
Fill form and create a new lead with project type = COMMISSION, industry = PHOTOGRAPHY - PASS
New lead appears in Kanban with Commission badge - PASS (TEST_Phase3 Commission Artwork visible)
Click a lead card to open LeadDetailModal - PASS
LeadDetailModal has 5 tabs: Activity, Quotes, Files, Details, Deliverables - PASS
Click Deliverables tab shows empty state ('No deliverables yet') - PASS
Click '+ Add Deliverable' shows form with Name, Type, Description, Due Date, Notes - PASS
Change deliverable type to 'Physical Art' shows extra fields (Dimensions, Material, Weight) - PASS
Change deliverable type to 'Service' shows extra fields (Session Date, Location, Duration) - PASS
Create a deliverable and verify it appears in the list - PASS (TEST_Photo Session created)
Deliverable shows status badge (Pending), type badge (Service), and action buttons - PASS
Click status advance button ('Start Work') to change status - PASS (Start Work button found)
Delete the deliverable - PASS (Empty state returned after delete)
Dashboard filter: select 'Service' from project type dropdown - leads filter - PASS (18 leads filtered)
Clear filter by clicking X on filter badge - PASS (19 leads after clear)
Regression: Portfolio page still works - PASS (My Portfolio header, Add Work, Preview buttons, Airplane Mode item visible)
Kanban view shows 5 columns with proper counts - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: All Phase 3 UI components implemented correctly with proper data-testid attributes
AddLeadModal: Project Type selector shows 4 card options with icons and descriptions
AddLeadModal: Conditional fields (Commission Details) appear/disappear based on project type selection
AddLeadModal: Deliverable Type selector shows 6 options with icons
DeliverablesTab: Form fields show conditional sections based on type (Physical Art vs Service)
DeliverablesTab: Status badges and type badges display correctly
DeliverablesTab: Action buttons (Start Work/Advance, Delete) work correctly
Dashboard: Filter dropdowns (All Types, All Industries) work correctly
Dashboard: Filter badge with X button allows clearing filters
Kanban: Lead cards show project type badge (Commission) alongside service type badge (Photography)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Phase3 Commission Artwork lead (client: TEST_Phase3 Client, email: test_phase3@example.com), Created TEST_Photo Session deliverable (deleted during testing)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Frontend fully tested. All new UI components working: AddLeadModal has Project Type selector (4 cards), Industry dropdown, Deliverable Type selector (6 options), commission-specific fields. LeadDetailModal has 5 tabs including new Deliverables tab with full CRUD. Dashboard toolbar has filter dropdowns (All Types, All Industries). Kanban cards show project type badges. TEST_Phase3 lead exists in database with COMMISSION project type and PHOTOGRAPHY industry. Project at /app/kolor-studio-v2/. Test data-testid attributes used: filter-project-type, filter-industry, project-type-selector, project-type-{type}, deliverable-type-selector, deliverable-type-{type}, tab-deliverables, add-deliverable-btn, deliverable-form, deliverable-name, deliverable-type, deliverable-save, deliverable-item-{id}, deliverable-advance-{id}, deliverable-delete-{id}.
